arts.ttl: Celtic and Southampton keen on Scotland U21 international
arts.sum: Celtic and Southampton are among the clubs in the picture to sign Motherwell’s Lennon Miller, according to a report from Germany. On Thursday, claims from the UK stated Motherwell rejected Royale Union Saint-Gilloise’s bid for Miller in the winter market.
